further_reading.title: Building effective agents

further_reading.title: Function calling and other API updates

notes: No inline citation claims were seeded. The module is primarily pedagogical framing, analogies, design guidance, exercises, and comparative tables without dated statistics, vendor/version assertions, named incidents, standards references, or other load-bearing factual specifics that require inline citation under the stated rules.
